global_description: A medium-sized bird with a streamlined body, predominantly brown with white streaks. It has a long tail and strong legs, adapted for running. The head features a distinctive crest and a long, slightly curved beak.

part_details.plumage: Brown with white streaks, providing camouflage
part_details.tail: Long and straight, aiding in balance
part_details.legs: Strong and muscular, adapted for running
part_details.head: Crested with a long, slightly curved beak
part_details.beak: Long, slightly curved, suited for catching prey

spatial_relations: The long tail extends from the rear of the body
The strong legs are positioned under the body
The head crest is located on top of the head
The beak protrudes from the front of the head
